issue_summary: add exceptions to WordlistLoader to missing file causes error instead of silently failing
javadoc_before:
/**
 * Loads a text file and adds every line as an entry to a Hashtable. Every line
 * should contain only one word. If the file is not found or on any error, an
 * empty table is returned.
 *
 * @author    Gerhard Schwarz
 * @version   $Id$
 *
 * @todo refactor to convert to Sets instead of Hashtable
 */
javadoc_after:
